Items.Title: 轻松自动化您的智能合约 | Automate your smart contract Easily
Items.Description:
苏拉夫马吉

发布于 7 月 1 日

我找到了一种神奇的方法，无需使用 Chainlink 即可轻松实现智能合约自动化

只要跟着我的步骤👇

基本上，我想每 20 天自动销毁我的 ERC20 代币，而不需要任何人工，所以经过研究，我发现使用 chainlink 我们可以执行自动化，但这并不那么容易

但幸运的是，我发现了一个很棒的网站（ gelato ops ），它可以帮助我轻松地通过我的智能合约自动化燃烧过程。

让我向您解释一下这个过程：

首先，您需要在任何链上部署智能合约，例如以太坊、多边形等

其次，访问 gelato ops 网站，连接您的 MetaMask 并创建一个任务

您需要粘贴您部署的智能合约地址和Abi

然后从智能合约中选择您想要自动化的功能

接下来，选择您想要执行智能合约功能的时间间隔，如果您以我为例，那么我想每 20 天销毁我的 erc20 代币

之后，您需要选择付款，其中应有足够的资金来支付执行自动化的汽油费。

最后，为您的自动化任务命名并支付燃气费以启动该任务。

就这样，您已经成功自动化了您的智能合约功能

所以今天就尝试一下，祝一切顺利

一旦被暂停，souravmaji1 将无法发表评论或发布帖子，直到其暂停被取消。

一旦解除暂停，souravmaji1 将能够再次发表评论和发布帖子。

一旦取消发布，souravmaji1 的所有帖子都将被隐藏，只有他们自己才能访问。

如果 souravmaji1 没有被暂停，他们仍然可以从仪表板重新发布帖子。

笔记：

感谢您保证 DEV 社区的安全。 您可以执行以下操作来标记 souravmaji1：

使 souravmaji1 的所有帖子不那么明显

举报其他不当行为

取消标记 souravmaji1 将恢复其帖子的默认可见性。



原文:

sourav maji

Posted on Jul 1

I have found a amazing way to automate your smart contract Easily without using Chainlink

just follow my steps 👇

Basically , I wanted to burn my ERC20 token in every 20 days automatically without any human effort so after researching I found that using chainlink we can perform the automation but it is not that easy

but luckily , I found a amazing website ( gelato ops ) which can help me to automate the burning process from my smart contract easily

Let me explain you about the process :

First you will need smart contract deployed in any chain such as Ethereum , polygon etc

Second, Go to gelato ops website connect your MetaMask and create a Task

You need to paste your deployed smart contract address and Abi

Then choose the function you want to automate from your smart contract

Next, select the time interval you want to execute your smart contract function and if you take my example then I want to burn my erc20 token in every 20 days

After that , you need to select payment where enough funds should be present to pay the gas fees for executing the automation

Finally , give a name to your automation task and pay the gas fees to start the task

That's it , you have automated your smart contract function successfully

so try it out today, all the best

Chainnodes💙🖤 - Dec 20 '22

Once suspended, souravmaji1 will not be able to comment or publish posts until their suspension is removed.

Once unsuspended, souravmaji1 will be able to comment and publish posts again.

Once unpublished, all posts by souravmaji1 will become hidden and only accessible to themselves.

If souravmaji1 is not suspended, they can still re-publish their posts from their dashboard.

Note:

Thanks for keeping DEV Community safe. Here is what you can do to flag souravmaji1:

Make all posts by souravmaji1 less visible

souravmaji1 consistently posts content that violates DEV Community's code of conduct because it is harassing, offensive or spammy.

Report other inappropriate conduct

Unflagging souravmaji1 will restore default visibility to their posts.
